letters.heading: Read the first pages of *They Only Came When It Rained*
letters.body: I'm finishing my first novel. Subscribe and confirm, and I'll send you the opening pages — then the cover, the launch date, and the occasional letter from the desk where the next stories take shape.
letters.microcopy: A few letters a year. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.

compactSignup.lead: Read the first pages of the novel.
compactSignup.microcopy: A few letters a year. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.

states.newsletterSuccess: Check your inbox — the first pages are on their way. (If nothing arrives, peek in spam and add me to your contacts.)
states.newsletterError: That didn't go through. Try again, or email hello@mykhanwrites.com.
states.contactSuccess: Thank you — your note's with me. I read everything, and I'll reply when I can.
states.contactError: Something went wrong sending that. Email hello@mykhanwrites.com and it'll reach me.
states.notFound404: This page took the last train out. Head back home →

pending.kitPending: Newsletter signup launching soon — check back shortly.
pending.web3formsPending: Contact form launching soon — email hello@mykhanwrites.com in the meantime.
